positive: Minimalist celestial forest landscape, featuring stylized silhouetted birch trees and geometric constellations connecting them. The scene must be perfectly centralized and highly symmetrical. Use a high-contrast palette of deep sapphire blues, cream off-white, and touches of muted gold for the stars. The style should be vector-graphic and Nordic-inspired, resembling a clean, single-sheet woodblock print or embroidery pattern. The mood is magical and tranquil. Focus on crisp, clean edges and bold, scalable shapes suitable for direct transfer onto fabric. The sky should be the primary element, filling the frame cleanly. Hyper-detailed, flat illustration style, clean vector artwork.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, cartoon, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, disfigured, out of frame, low resolution, photo, realistic
